docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GAUTIER, RICHART AS TO DEFENDANT SF CABINETS, FINN OLSEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-20-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SF CABINETS, FINN OLSEN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GAUTIER, RICHART RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SF CABINETS, FINN OLSEN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,052.00, DEFT FAILED TO APPEAR. THE 12/04 CONTRACT BETWEEN PLTF AND DEFT IS HEREBY RESCINDED. THE DEFT SHALL IMMEDIATELY RETURN ALL OF PLAINTIFF'S CABINETS AND ANY OTHER PROPERTY IN THE CUSTODY OF THE DEFT TO THE PLTF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SF CABINETS, FINN OLSEN
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $5,100.07 AS TO DEFENDANT SF CABINETS, FINN OLSEN
